source_policy.normalization_scope: formula ingredients only: ADX/DMI, ATR, MA slope/spread, RSI, volatility percentile, Bollinger bandwidth

recipes.formula: ADX(14) >= 22 and +DI > -DI and MA20 > MA50 and MA20 slope > 0 and ATR percentile <= 0.85
recipes.notes: Trend/momentum community formula shape only; no script PnL used.

recipes.formula: ATR percentile >= 0.85 or Bollinger bandwidth percentile >= 0.85 or ADX(14) >= 28 with wide DMI spread
recipes.notes: Stress detector candidate only; no live TradingView data trusted.

recipes.formula: RSI(14) extreme and ADX falling over 5 bars and Bollinger bandwidth percentile >= 0.60
recipes.notes: Reversal setup formula candidate only; confirmation still requires chronological calibration.
